task:
for cmd/entire/cli/utils.go:47: 

The gosec suppression rationale here is misleading: copyFile is also used to restore transcripts into agent session locations (e.g., rewind.go via resolveTranscriptPath), which may be outside “internal metadata” directories depending on the agent. Please adjust the suppression comment to reflect the real trust boundary (or add a small guard to ensure dst is within an expected/allowed directory) so the security lint waiver is correctly justified.
user_feedback_text:
for cmd/entire/cli/utils.go:47: 

The gosec suppression rationale here is misleading: copyFile is also used to restore transcripts into agent session locations (e.g., rewind.go via resolveTranscriptPath), which may be outside “internal metadata” directories depending on the agent. Please adjust the suppression comment to reflect the real trust boundary (or add a small guard to ensure dst is within an expected/allowed directory) so the security lint waiver is correctly justified.
